topStories.title: Trinamool Congress issuing fake press cards to its workers to influence voters: BJP's Suvendu Adhikari
topStories.description: Suvendu Adhikari claimed that these individuals were "posing as journalists" to gain access to sensitive locations "to influence voters and manipulate the election process"

topStories.description: From Venezuela to Hormuz to Malacca, the US has made three moves to strangle China's oil. Now a $240M drone over Cuba signals move four - and Trump wants the island. The chessboard is almost...

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 49 of the US-Iran conflict?
topStories.description: Celebrations in Lebanon as a 10-day ceasefire begins, opening the door to talks on a longer-term Israel-Lebanon deal.

topStories.title: Texas court interpreter Meenu Batra’s ICE detention raises concerns; ‘they want to make me disappear’
topStories.description: Meenu Batra, Texas’s only licensed Punjabi, Hindi and Urdu court interpreter, alleges she was treated “like a criminal” after being detained by ICE, raising concerns over due process and enforcement practices.

topStories.title: ‘Vengeance for all’: How Iran’s Lego videos won narrative war against Trump
topStories.description: The viral videos by Iranian creators, say analysts, are high-quality though cheap, and hit fissures in US politics.

topStories.title: What we know about the ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel
topStories.description: A 10-day truce between the two countries now in effect, with Iran-backed Hezbollah voicing support, as negotiations continue between the US and Iran.

topStories.description: US President Donald Trump has described the war on Iran which has killed more than 2,000 people as a ‘little diversion’.

topStories.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth read a prayer drawn from a misquote of Ezekiel 25:17 in Pulp Fiction.

topStories.description: The Iranian and US blockades of the Strait of Hormuz are reviving anxiety over the fate of Asia’s most crucial strategic bottleneck.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin announces expansion of visa restriction policy in Western Hemisphere
dailyNews.description: The State Department said it imposed visa restrictions on 26 individuals under the expanded policy targeting those acting for U.S. adversaries.

dailyNews.title: Singer D4vd arrested and held without bail in case tied to teen found dead in Tesla: Police
dailyNews.description: Singer D4vd, whose real name is David Burke, was arrested in connection with the murder of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez in LA, LAPD says.

dailyNews.title: EXCLUSIVE: NYC officials refuse ICE hold for illegal alien accused in arson that killed 4 and injured 7: DHS
dailyNews.description: A Mexican national illegal alien accused of randomly setting a NYC apartment on fire that killed four could be released due to the city's sanctuary policies, DHS says.

dailyNews.title: Former SMU cornerback Teddy Knox faces $2.88M judgment for crash linked to Rashee Rice's Lamborghini race
dailyNews.description: Teddy Knox, who was racing Rashee Rice's Lamborghini in a 2024 Dallas crash, was ordered to pay $2.88 million in a default judgment lawsuit.

dailyNews.title: Miami Catholic Charities loses $11M contract providing care for migrant children under Trump administration
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration canceled an $11 million Catholic Charities contract in Miami, citing a drop in illegal immigration and fewer unaccompanied minors.

dailyNews.title: Blue Panther and Último Guerrero steal the show at CMLL's first-ever US event in Las Vegas
dailyNews.description: Blue Panther defeated Último Guerrero in a legends match at CMLL's historic first solo U.S. show held at the Palms Casino Resort in Las Vegas Thursday.

dailyNews.title: Ex-teacher faces 25 charges, including rape and abuse as investigation widens
dailyNews.description: Former Louisiana teacher Marisa Noel faces 25 charges, including indecent behavior with juveniles and first-degree rape, the sheriff's office said.

dailyNews.title: Rogan backs reality TV star Spencer Pratt’s bid for LA Mayor, says ‘I’d vote for you’
dailyNews.description: Joe Rogan endorses Spencer Pratt for Los Angeles mayor, saying he would absolutely vote for the reality TV star if he still lived in California.

dailyNews.title: Missing pregnant woman found dead after mysterious Texas disappearance
dailyNews.description: Ashanti Allen, a 23-year-old woman who disappeared while eight months pregnant, was found dead in Houston, her family confirmed. No arrests have been reported.

dailyNews.title: Franklin Graham defends Trump in letter shared on Truth Social after AI ‘Jesus’ image backlash
dailyNews.description: Rev. Franklin Graham defended Trump over an AI-generated image controversy, saying the president thought it depicted a doctor helping someone, not Jesus.

dailyNews.title: Report details rising pressure on underground Catholics as China denies crackdown
dailyNews.description: Human Rights Watch says China is increasing pressure on 12 million Catholics amid a decade-long campaign to align religion with party ideology.

dailyNews.title: Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons submits resignation letter to DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin
dailyNews.description: Fox News has confirmed acting ICE Director Todd Lyons submitted his resignation letter to Homeland Secretary Markwayne Mullin Thursday.

topStories.description: Dr. Erica Schwartz is seen as a highly qualified traditional choice and tapping her is the strongest signal yet that the administration is veering away from vaccine skepticism this election year.

topStories.title: Trump to Pick Ousted FEMA Head to Lead Agency Again
topStories.description: Cameron Hamilton is a former Navy SEAL who ran unsuccessfully for Congress.

topStories.title: Trump Is the End of a 100-Year Experiment
topStories.description: A conservative court watcher explains why the president has failed to bend the judicial branch to his will.

topStories.title: Stephen Colbert Delights in Trump’s ‘Ongoing Papal Feud’
topStories.description: The host of “The Late Show” recapped what he called “yet another day when the entire world is on edge over President Trump’s senseless and elective war — with the pope.”

topStories.title: Controversial surveillance program extended by House but only until April 30
topStories.description: The House OK'd a short-term renewal until April 30 of FISA, the controversial surveillance program used by U.S. spy agencies, after Republicans revolted, refusing President Trump's push for a longer extension.

topStories.title: Where Trump's goals in Iran stand at this point
topStories.description: President Trump has repeatedly claimed that the war with Iran is "almost over." He has also stated multiple times that the U.S. is close to accomplishing "all of its goals" in Iran. CBS News' Robert Costa reports and Michael Doran, director of the Center for Peace and Security in the Middle East at the Hudson Institute, have more.

CBS News' Robert Costa reports and Michael Doran, director of the Center for Peace and Security in the Middle East at the Hudson Institute, have more.

dailyNews.title: Trump continues feud with Pope Leo over war with Iran
dailyNews.description: Earlier this week, President Trump turned his criticism toward an unlikely subject- Pope Leo. Michael O'Loughlin, the executive editor of the National Catholic Reporter, joins "The Daily Report."

dailyNews.title: Trump nominates Dr. Erica Schwartz for new CDC director
dailyNews.description: President Trump nominated a new director for the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention on Thursday. Dr. Erica Schwartz is a former deputy surgeon general and retired Coast Guard rear admiral.

dailyNews.title: Trump says war in Iran is going 'swimmingly' and 'should be ending pretty soon'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's latest prediction on the end of the war against Iran came hours after Israel announced a ceasefire with Lebanon.

dailyNews.title: Trump nominates Erica Schwartz as CDC director amid turmoil around leadership, vaccine policy
dailyNews.description: The CDC has been going through turmoil and several leadership shakeups under HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.

dailyNews.title: Oil falls as Trump reiterates Iran war ‘should’ end soon and Israel-Lebanon truce lifts hopes
dailyNews.description: Oil prices fell after Donald Trump said Israel and Lebanon had agreed to a 10-day ceasefire following talks in Washington.

dailyNews.title: Trump says gas prices 'not very high' as most U.S. voters blame him for price spike
dailyNews.description: Trump touted the rising stock market as he brushed off concerns that Americans are laboring under higher gas prices as a result of the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Vance's Iran and Orbán setbacks raise questions about his standing with Trump
dailyNews.description: Recent staffing moves among JD Vance's aides have fueled new speculation that the VP and his allies are preparing for a 2028 presidential bid.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Trump announces ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon
dailyNews.description: The ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon could be a major step toward a peace deal for Iran and the US. President Trump says US talks with Iran could restart this weekend, and he’s confident they are close to a deal. NBC News’ Richard Engel has the story.
